channel.title: not a blog
channel.description: Holy crap its a picture of a generic bridge. so badass. Also “What killed the dinosaurs? the ICE AGE” Its all water under the bridge. The stories you are about to read are true, however the names have been changed to protect the innocent.

item.title: The not-so Affordable Healthcare Act
item.description:
Today is day ten of the government shutdown, with the national parks, FDA, NASA, and the CDC are all still closed. This quest to shutdown the “Affordable Care Act” have been initiated by a Senator Tex Cruz (R-TX) have awakened the people do the downsides of the Affordable Care Act. The piece of legislation that was flawed from the start and continued to spiral downward as time progressed. In a world where people get their primary news from Facebook, and Twitter we have raised an era of difference, what we need is alliance. We can take points from both sides to re-write a completely new set of codes to reform healthcare, not to use government provided socialized medicine. I’m not screaming Shutdown the government, or shutdown Social Security, In a system that thrives in balance, the left and right wings have been corrupted. The Private sector has already proven itself, just look at SpaceX and various other private enterprises accomplishing feats from launching private probes into earth orbit as well as manned spaceflight. I have one question to the good people who support President Obama, Nancy Pelosi and The Affordable Care Act, Who is going to pay for all of this medical care? If you can sign up regardless of your condition, I could simply pay the fine until I get sick, then join as I could not be refused. Sure it’s easy to sign up for but, the “care” will not be efficient.

A few possible solutions to this problem: More doctors. Anyone who has taken any economics class will tell you about Supply and Demand, and the all important Market Clearing Price. The Capitalist System has worked so far, why are you so eager to give it up. Do you wan’t to be a part time nation? Do YOU want to leave an IMPACT on future generations. You pride yourself on caring and being “politically correct”, that is the most BS I have ever heard. There is no political correctness. Yes you are entitled to your opinion however you don’t have to force it on everyone. However if your system is so great, it shouldn't have to be imposed by law onto everyone, they should go willingly, there is no need for forcibly imposed healthcare.

item.title: Down the Hard Road
item.description:
#include <rant.h>
#include <uselessblogpost.h>
//------Caution toatal ranting, AND SOUND if you have work to do just do it, don’t let this waste your time.

“Why is this still hosted on my primary server? Honestly I am lazy as they come. As creativity comes, to creativity I am as boring as they come, however get me on the right topic I can talk for Ages. To the point of headaches. Unfortunately few understand the complex internal mechanism of my cerebral cortex. You now what else bugs me, iWeb ’08 does not support animated GIFS (It is highly unlikely it ever will) also when in photoshop and the teacher requests you to save as a TIFF or JPEG. Why no love for PNG. It is substantially better than EVERY other image format, transparency, high DPI, low file size and universal compatibility. It makes me wonder, did we encode the images on the Voyager spacecraft in PNG, otherwise the foreign life may not be able to recognize them.

In recent development world, my fork of the webkit browser is moving on, as well as my NDS Open Sourced MultiMedia Launcher( I need a new name). It supports a shit ton of stuff adding functionality to a 7 year old console with only 4Megabytes of Ram and a 66Mhz (it even interferes with the FM Band of radio when overclocked to 70 Mhz!) CPU Compare that to my Dual Core i5 running at 3.2 Ghz. See the download page for more information on the NDS Multimedia Player. Also I have initialized project Paper CPU, a project that will teach, myself and mabye others low level Assembly programing, and the revolutionary part is, it is a whole 8-bit CPU that will run on sheets of paper, so much cheaper than the linux pc. (I have nothing against the RPI, in fact I am in the process of procuring one.)

You know what else drives me crazy? Is when a someone thinks they know more in a field that they clearly know almost nothing about, or their little knowledge is incredibly biased. To much shit. At least I have the shoes to get through it.
//end rant

Props to those who can recognize the reference to that last sentence, it is a good film.

Also in sadder news, Tom Clancy, who authored one of my favorite books and influenced my favorite films such as The Hunt for Red October has passed away. It was a major loss for all, and my condolences to his family.

item.title: Well now, there it is.
item.description:
“Allow me to break da ice”. This is intended to be a private blog(lol privacy in the modern world), however it is currently being hosted under my main server(this is going to end well, but thats what I get for being cheap and only keeping one server up and running 24/7. Back to business: this blog will probably die a cold death like the “others” so don’t expect me to keep a perfect primary source quality record. It is not gonna happen.
//init ranting.framework
print col1 ”in this world we live in the amount of ignorance is to damn high”
print col2 “Why do wars start”
//suspend ranting.framework
Also I still use iWeb, Deal with it. this website will hopefully improve what limited writing skills I have as well as provide an outlet for a LOT of built up STRESS.
thanks, and as always have nice day. DUCES
<!--End Blog Post-->
